description_long: This chest of drawers features a classic, vintage-inspired design with a gently curved front and ornate, cabriole-style legs. The body is painted in a muted beige color, while the top surface is a contrasting dark wood with a visible grain pattern, adding a touch of rustic elegance. Three spacious drawers are present, each adorned with decorative, vintage-style handles and subtle floral motifs at the center. The sides are plain with recessed panels, and the back is constructed from a different wood, finished in a natural brown tone with vertical grain. The overall construction appears sturdy, with a solid wood frame and a smooth, hard finish. This piece would be suitable for both indoor and sheltered outdoor urban environments, such as porches or garages.
description: A vintage-style chest of drawers with a beige painted body, dark wood top, three ornate drawers, and cabriole legs.
description_view_0: Front view showing three curved drawers with decorative handles and floral motifs, and ornate legs.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the plain, recessed panel and the thickness of the dark wood top.
description_view_2: Rear view revealing a flat, natural wood back with vertical grain and no decorative features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the plain panel and the profile of the legs.
